name: claude-code-documentation-knowledge-autoupdated
description: Verification toolchain for the claude-code-documentation-knowledge skill. The actual skill content lives in SKILL*.md / rules/*.md; this package.json only carries the devDeps for scripts/ verification.

scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:examples && npm run verify:templates && npm run verify:populated && npm run verify:diff-size && npm run verify:docs-drift && npm run verify:sanitizer-parity && npm run verify:gate-parity && npm run verify:agent-tests
